cross_domain_bonus_rationale: All hypotheses bridge EVT/mathematical statistics to life sciences (proteomics/cell biology), spanning 2+ disciplinary boundaries

ranked_hypotheses.title: Complex-Minimum Tm Identifies Thermal Bottleneck Complexes Invisible to Mean-Tm Analysis
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_notes: Consider extending with non-equilibrium kinetic corrections (heating rate dependence); explore whether HSP70/HSP90 STRING scores (≥0.93 confirmed) predict the ±2°C chaperone buffering offset magnitude systematically across complexes

ranked_hypotheses.title: GEV Tail Index (xi) as Phylogenomic Signature of Thermal Adaptation Strategy
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_notes: Phylogenetically independent contrasts are critical for n=13; clarify whether tail-truncation vs. distribution-shift strategies produce distinguishable ξ signatures with existing Meltome Atlas OGT metadata

ranked_hypotheses.title: Censored GEV Recovers the Invisible 20% Below TPP Window
ranked_hypotheses.key_flaw: IDP model misspecification: IDPs lack cooperative unfolding → Tm undefined → censored GEV assumes Tm exists for all censored proteins. IDPs constitute 30-50% of eukaryotic proteomes and are overrepresented among Tm < 30°C proteins.
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_notes: IDP pre-filtering is the central repair: apply censored GEV only to proteins with AlphaFold pLDDT > 70 (structured) or IUPred disorder < 30%; separate analysis for IDPs using non-equilibrium unfolding models. Evolution should produce a modified hypothesis that explicitly scopes the claim to non-IDP proteins and estimates what fraction of the invisible 20% is IDP vs. genuinely stably censored.

ranked_hypotheses.title: POT Functional Enrichment Reveals Thermal Disposability in Signal Transduction
ranked_hypotheses.prior_art: Leuenberger et al. 2017 (Science, PMID 28232526) — GO enrichment of thermally unstable proteins already performed
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_notes: Must deconfound from Leuenberger 2017: propose explicit test isolating GPD-threshold benefit vs. percentile-based benchmark; control for protein size, IUPred disorder fraction, expression level (abundance from PAX database), evolutionary age (phylostratigraphy). Drop 'thermal disposability' framing — replace with a testable functional consequence of low-Tm enrichment in signal transduction hubs.

ranked_hypotheses.title: Pathway-Level Block Maxima = Translation Initiation as Universal Thermal Death Bottleneck
ranked_hypotheses.exclusion_rationale: Biological prediction (translation initiation as thermally sensitive process) is established from heat stress biology (eIF2α phosphorylation, eIF4F disassembly). Membrane Sensor Hypothesis (Vigh et al. 2007 PNAS) provides active counter-evidence that the protein-Tm framework misses the primary thermal death mechanism. Evolving this hypothesis requires fundamental reframing — not incremental improvement — making it a lower priority relative to the four selected hypotheses.

diversity_check.notes: H5 and H7 share the spirit of 'use EVT to identify which biology is thermally most vulnerable' but use different EVT methods (block maxima vs. GPD/POT) and make different predictions. No 3+ hypotheses are convergent enough to trigger adjustment.
